ticketing-1.description: Cyberpunk-inspired dark ticketing platform with neon cyan & hot pink accents, animated scrolling ticker and scanline overlay. Built for high-energy live event brands.

ticketing-2.description: Refined editorial aesthetic with cream parchment tones, Playfair Display serif typography and rust-red accents. Positioned for classical theatre, opera and prestige events.

ticketing-3.description: Raw brutalist design in stark yellow & black with Space Mono monospace typography. Hard borders, numbered event listings and zero decorative softness — pure attitude.

ticketing-4.description: Opulent Art Deco design with gold borders, sunburst motifs and Playfair serif typography on rich dark parchment. Designed for premium theatre, opera and classical venues.

construction-1.description: Heavy industrial dark steel aesthetic with diagonal stripe patterns, orange impact accents and bold Oswald typography. Signals raw strength and reliability for large-scale builders.

construction-2.description: Restrained luxury aesthetic with warm cream tones, Cormorant Garamond serif and antique gold accents. Split-screen layout and Roman numerals signal a refined, high-end construction firm.

construction-3.description: Bold high-visibility safety yellow & black palette inspired by construction site signage. Anton display font, scrolling ticker band and 2×2 stats grid create unmissable impact.

construction-4.description: Clean Swiss-modernist grid system with DM Mono and Fraunces typefaces. Stark red & white palette, ruled grid nav and systematic layout hierarchy communicate precision engineering.

aircon-1.description: High-tech dark blue interface with cyan accents and a glowing radial atmosphere. Pricing cards in the hero highlight service tiers. Builds technical trust for professional HVAC services.

aircon-2.description: Clean wellness-inspired teal and white design with rounded corners and a prominent booking form. Friendly and approachable, perfect for residential aircon cleaning targeting homeowners.

aircon-3.description: Dark industrial aesthetic with vivid orange accents and Exo 2 geometric typeface. Horizontal service row and numbered process steps communicate professionalism for commercial clients.

aircon-4.description: Soft organic wellness aesthetic with mint-green palette, Gilda Display serif and rounded UI elements. Health-focused messaging targets allergy-conscious families. Booking form in hero.

rental-car-1.description: Cinematic dark red and black palette with Montserrat typography. Large car emoji hero, inline search bar and fleet grid. Premium feel with a focus on speed and no-fuss booking.

rental-car-2.description: Fresh eco-green brand identity with a split hero and integrated booking form. Poppins typography and nature-inspired tones position this rental service as sustainable and family-friendly.

rental-car-3.description: Ultra-luxury dark gold aesthetic with ghost watermark "DRIVE" lettering, Cormorant Garamond serif and Jost body text. Subtle and sophisticated — positioned for premium vehicle hire.

rental-car-4.description: Warm retro 70s road-trip aesthetic with amber & brown tones, Righteous display font and polka-dot background texture. Vintage travel poster energy with a modern booking experience.

realestate-1.description: High-end real estate brand with near-black background, antique gold accents and Cormorant Garamond serif typography. Split-screen hero with property search panel targets luxury buyers.

realestate-2.description: Bright modern blue real estate portal with tabbed search (Buy / Rent / New Builds) and property card grid. Nunito rounded sans-serif creates a friendly, approachable property search experience.

realestate-3.description: Bold brutalist real estate brand with massive B&W typography, red accent line and Bebas Neue display. Raw, architectural energy with a strong editorial grid of property listings below the hero.

realestate-4.description: Soft Scandinavian-inspired real estate platform with blush pinks, sage greens and Crimson Pro serif typography. Warm property mosaic hero and an agent directory give a boutique, personal feel.

hotel-1.description: Opulent dark luxury resort with radial gold glow, ghost watermark branding and Cormorant Garamond serif. Full-width booking strip, room cards and amenity grid create a complete resort experience.

hotel-2.description: Warm boutique hotel with vibrant coral/terracotta palette and DM Serif Display typography. Animated room cards with hover-lift and a prominent seasonal promo card communicate personality and warmth.

hotel-3.description: Dark business hotel aesthetic with teal accents, Syne + Inter type pairing and structured booking panel. Grid-based room cards and multi-city stats bar — purpose-built for corporate travellers.

hotel-4.description: Bold maximalist tropical resort design with vivid yellow & terracotta accents, Unbounded display font and organic blob shapes. Prominent booking widget in hero. Perfect for Bali or island luxury resorts.

plumbing-1.description: Trust-building dark navy design with a bold red emergency sidebar panel and Exo 2 geometric sans. 6-service grid and 4-step process with connector line communicates speed and reliability.

plumbing-2.description: Warm orange and cream palette with Poppins rounded sans-serif. Pricing card embedded in the hero alongside a service pricing list — removes friction and builds trust immediately for homeowners.

plumbing-3.description: Dark industrial yellow & black with Barlow Condensed, diagonal texture and an announcement topbar. Numbered service rows slide on hover — authoritative and no-nonsense plumbing branding.

plumbing-4.description: Clean green + blue gradient branding with DM Serif Display and trust-chip row. Pricing panel in the hero eliminates price anxiety. Eco-conscious messaging targets modern homeowners.

event-organizer-1.description: Opulent dark event studio with concentric circle hero, antique gold accents and Cormorant Garamond serif. 6-service grid, testimonials and gallery mosaic position this as a premium, high-end planner.

event-organizer-2.description: Vibrant purple-to-pink gradient design with Syne display font and a colourful event mosaic hero. Dark background with glowing service chips and 3-tier packages. Energetic, modern and eye-catching.

event-organizer-3.description: Editorial black and white split-screen design with red accent and Bebas Neue + Playfair Display pairing. Enquiry form built into the dark right half reduces conversion steps instantly.

event-organizer-4.description: Bold Memphis-inspired playful design with Young Serif, vibrant multi-colour palette and a colourful mosaic hero. Neo-brutalist buttons with box-shadows — full of energy and personality for modern event brands.

franchising-1.description: Sleek tech-startup dark aesthetic with blue glow orbs, grid texture and Space Mono monospace branding. Live performance dashboard widget, ROI-tagged brand cards and data-driven copy targets sophisticated investors.

franchising-2.description: Warm orange and cream franchise marketplace targeting first-time buyers. Plus Jakarta Sans typography, industry category tabs and a split enquiry form create a welcoming, accessible onboarding experience.

franchising-3.description: Deep forest green dark theme with Manrope typeface and announcement topbar. Trending franchise sidebar with live ROI data, 8-industry grid and 5-step process signal a sophisticated, data-forward marketplace.
